headline: Assessing Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance snapshot Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) has seen its share price soften recently, with a 2% daily move, about a 9% pullback over the past week, and a month return near 17% lower. Over longer periods, the stock shows a modest negative year to date move and a 6% decline over the past year, set against a 4% total return over three years and a 54% total return decline over five years.
